beskrivelse.no: API-integrasjoner, meldingskøer, data pipelines, asynkron kommunikasjon, ESB/middleware og systemsamspill
beskrivelse.en: API integrations, message queues, data pipelines, asynchronous communication, ESB/middleware, and system interactions

saarbarhet.no: API-kall henger uten timeout, eller timeout så kort at normale operasjoner feiler
saarbarhet.en: API calls hang without a timeout, or the timeout is so short that normal operations fail

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Definere timeouts per operasjon basert på SLA, implementere connection timeout og read timeout separat
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Define timeouts per operation based on the SLA, and implement connection and read timeouts separately

risikoelement.no: HTTP-feil håndteres feil eller for likt
risikoelement.en: HTTP errors are handled incorrectly or too uniformly

saarbarhet.no: Klient behandler alle feil likt, retry på 4xx, ingen skille mellom transient og permanent feil
saarbarhet.en: The client handles all errors the same way, retries on 4xx responses, and does not distinguish between transient and permanent errors

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere feilhåndtering basert på HTTP status (2xx, 4xx, 5xx), kun retry på transient errors (429, 503, etc.)
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement error handling based on HTTP status (2xx, 4xx, 5xx), and only retry transient errors such as 429 and 503

saarbarhet.no: Breaking changes bryter eksisterende klienter, ingen deprecation-strategi, tvungen migrering
saarbarhet.en: Breaking changes disrupt existing clients, there is no deprecation strategy, and migration is forced

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere API versioning (URL-path eller header), semantic versioning, deprecation policy med sunset-dato
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement API versioning through the URL path or headers, use semantic versioning, and define a deprecation policy with a sunset date

saarbarhet.no: Én klient kan overbelaste API, ingen beskyttelse mot misbruk eller bugs i klient
saarbarhet.en: A single client can overload the API, and there is no protection against misuse or client-side bugs

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere rate limiting per klient/API-key, returnere 429 med Retry-After header, dokumentere limits
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement rate limiting per client and API key, return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header, and document the limits

saarbarhet.no: Fortsetter å kalle feilende tjeneste, forverrer situasjon, cascade failures, ingen graceful degradation
saarbarhet.en: The system continues to call a failing service, worsens the situation, causes cascading failures, and lacks graceful degradation

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere circuit breaker pattern (closed/open/half-open), fallback-mekanisme, overvåke circuit breaker state
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement a circuit breaker pattern (closed/open/half-open), add a fallback mechanism, and monitor the circuit breaker state

risikoelement.en: API documentation is outdated or incorrect

saarbarhet.no: Klienter implementerer basert på feil dokumentasjon, OpenAPI/Swagger ikke i sync med kode
saarbarhet.en: Clients implement against incorrect documentation, and the OpenAPI/Swagger specification is out of sync with the code

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Generere API-dokumentasjon fra kode (OpenAPI annotations), automatisk validering i CI/CD, kontrakt testing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Generate API documentation from code using OpenAPI annotations, add automatic validation in CI/CD, and use contract testing

saarbarhet.no: Message broker feiler, ingen persistering, ikke-durables køer, ingen dead letter queue
saarbarhet.en: The message broker fails, persistence is missing, queues are not durable, and there is no dead-letter queue

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Durable queues, publisher confirms/acks, dead letter queues, message replay capability, overvåke message rates
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Use durable queues, publisher confirms/acks, dead-letter queues, message replay capability, and monitor message rates

saarbarhet.no: At-least-once delivery uten idempotency, meldinger prosesseres flere ganger, data-korrupsjon
saarbarhet.en: At-least-once delivery without idempotency causes messages to be processed multiple times and can corrupt data

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere idempotency i consumers (idempotency keys), deduplication logic, transaksjonell prosessering
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement idempotency in consumers with idempotency keys, deduplication logic, and transactional processing

saarbarhet.no: Meldinger prosesseres i feil rekkefølge, partisjonering ikke konfigurert, concurrent consumers
saarbarhet.en: Messages are processed in the wrong order, partitioning is not configured, and consumers run concurrently

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Bruke partition keys (Kafka) eller message groups (SQS FIFO), sequence numbers, single consumer per partition hvor ordering kreves
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Bruke partition keys (Kafka) or message groups (SQS FIFO), sequence numbers, single consumer per partition hvor ordering kreves

saarbarhet.no: Applikasjon forventer umiddelbar konsistens, race conditions, bruker ser utdatert data
saarbarhet.en: Applikasjon forventer umiddelbar konsistens, race conditions, user ser outdated data

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Design for eventual consistency, optimistic UI, polling/webhooks for status, versioning på data, conflict resolution
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Design for eventual consistency, optimistic UI, polling/webhooks for status, versioning on data, conflict resolution

saarbarhet.no: Én ugyldig melding feiler processing, blokkerer hele køen, ingen DLQ, infinite retry loop
saarbarhet.en: A single invalid message breaks processing, blocks the entire queue, there is no DLQ, and retries continue indefinitely

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) etter N retries, max retry count, message validation før processing, DLQ overvåking og alerts
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Dead Letter Queue (DLQ) after N retries, max retry count, message validation before processing, DLQ monitoring and alerts

saarbarhet.no: Producers sender raskere enn consumers prosesserer, backlog bygges opp, memory issues, datedness
saarbarhet.en: Producers send messages faster than consumers can process them, causing backlog growth, memory pressure, and stale data

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Overvåke consumer lag kontinuerlig, auto-scaling av consumers, backpressure mekanismer, alerting på lag threshold
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Continuously monitor consumer lag, use auto-scaling for consumers, add backpressure mechanisms, and alert when lag thresholds are exceeded

saarbarhet.no: Ugyldige meldinger aksepteres, schema changes bryter consumers, ingen versjonering av meldinger
saarbarhet.en: Ugyldige messages aksepteres, schema changes bryter consumers, no versjonering of messages

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Schema registry (Avro, Protobuf), validering ved produce og consume, schema evolution rules (backward/forward compatible)
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Schema registry (Avro, Protobuf), validation during produce and consume, schema evolution rules (backward/forward compatible)

saarbarhet.no: Feil i mapping logic, nullverdier ikke håndtert, type casting feiler, data-korrupsjon
saarbarhet.en: Errors in mapping logic, nullverdier not handled, type casting fails, data-korrupsjon

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Comprehensive testing av transformasjoner, null-handling, type safety, data quality checks, reconciliation reports
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Comprehensive testing of transformasjoner, null-handling, type safety, data quality checks, reconciliation reports

saarbarhet.no: Source system endrer schema uten varsel, pipelines feiler, data mappes feil, nye felter ignoreres
saarbarhet.en: The source system changes the schema without warning, pipelines fail, data is mapped incorrectly, and new fields are ignored

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Schema registry, automated schema validation, schema evolution notifications, backward compatibility testing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Schema registry, automated schema validation, schema evolution notifications, backward compatibility testing

saarbarhet.no: Duplikater, manglende data, ugyldig data prosesseres og lagres, ingen data quality gates
saarbarhet.en: Duplicate, missing, or invalid data is processed and stored because there are no data quality gates

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implement a data quality framework (for example Great Expectations or Deequ), add automated quality checks, quarantine bad data, and track quality metrics
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement a data quality framework such as Great Expectations or Deequ, add automated quality checks, quarantine bad data, and track quality metrics

risikoelement.en: Pipeline errors lead to incomplete data

saarbarhet.no: Pipeline feiler midt i kjøring, partial data loaded, ingen transaksjonalitet, vanskelig å gjenoppretting
saarbarhet.en: A pipeline fails midway through a run, partial data is loaded, there is no transactional control, and recovery is difficult

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Atomic loads (staging + swap), checkpointing, idempotent pipelines, automated gjenoppretting, data lineage sporing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Atomic loads (staging + swap), checkpointing, idempotent pipelines, automated recovery, data lineage tracking

risikoelement.no: Full load vs incremental load problemer
risikoelement.en: Full load vs incremental load problemer

saarbarhet.no: Incremental logic feil (missed updates/deletes), watermarks ikke oppdatert, change data capture (CDC) feiler
saarbarhet.en: Incremental logic errors cause missed updates/deletes, watermarks are not updated, and change data capture (CDC) fails

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Reliable CDC implementation, watermark management, reconciliation between full and incremental, soft deletes
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Reliable CDC implementation, watermark management, reconciliation between full and incremental, soft deletes

saarbarhet.no: Umulig å spore hvor data kom fra, debugging vanskelig, compliance issues, ingen impact analysis
saarbarhet.en: Umulig to spore hvor data kom from, debugging difficult, compliance issues, no impact analysis

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implement data lineage sporing (for example OpenLineage), metadata management, a data catalog, and end-to-end tracing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement data lineage tracking such as OpenLineage, together with metadata management, a data catalog, and end-to-end tracing

saarbarhet.no: Hendelsesdrevet arkitektur uten oversikt, ingen felles forståelse av arbeidsflyter og vanskelig feilsøking
saarbarhet.en: An event-driven architecture lacks overview, there is no shared understanding of workflows, and debugging is difficult

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Event schema registry, event storming workshops, distributed tracing, service mesh for observability
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Event schema registry, event storming workshops, distributed tracing, service mesh for observability

risikoelement.en: Saga pattern errors and compensation failures

saarbarhet.no: Distribuert transaksjon feiler midt i saga, kompenserende transaksjoner ikke implementert eller feiler
saarbarhet.en: A distributed transaction fails midway through a saga, and compensating transactions are missing or fail

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere saga pattern med orchestration (Temporal, Camunda), kompenserende transaksjoner, saga status sporing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement the saga pattern with orchestration through tools such as Temporal or Camunda, together with compensating transactions and saga status tracking

saarbarhet.no: Data inkonsistent på tvers av systemer, manglende transaksjonalitet, race conditions
saarbarhet.en: Data inkonsistent on across of systems, missing transaksjonalitet, race conditions

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Unngå distribuerte transaksjoner hvor mulig, bruk saga pattern, eventual consistency med reconciliation, idempotency
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Avoid distributed transactions where possible, use a saga pattern, and combine eventual consistency with reconciliation and idempotency

saarbarhet.no: Arbeidsflytmotor eller orkestrator feiler, alle arbeidsflyter stopper og tilstandsdata går tapt
saarbarhet.en: Workflow engine/orchestrator fails, all workflows stopper, state data goes tapt

foreslaatteTiltak.no: High availability orchestrator, persistent state store, arbeidsflyt resume capability, circuit breakers til orchestrator
foreslaatteTiltak.en: High availability orchestrator, persistent state store, workflow resume capability, circuit breakers to orchestrator

saarbarhet.no: arbeidsflyt state ikke persistent, retry feiler fordi state tapt, ingen deduplication
saarbarhet.en: Workflow state not persistent, retry fails fordi state tapt, no deduplication

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Persistent arbeidsflyt state (database, arbeidsflyt engine), idempotency keys, state machine pattern, event sourcing
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Persistent workflow state (database, workflow engine), idempotency keys, state machine pattern, event sourcing

saarbarhet.no: Aggressive retries forverrer overload, thundering herd, ingen jitter, DDoS på egen infrastruktur
saarbarhet.en: Aggressive retries worsens overload, thundering herd, no jitter, DDoS on egen infrastruktur

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Exponential backoff med jitter, max retry count, retry kun transient errors, circuit breaker for å stoppe retries
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Exponential backoff with jitter, max retry count, retry only transient errors, circuit breaker for to stoppe retries

saarbarhet.no: Retry eller replay av operasjon gir uønsket duplikater (dobbel betaling, dupliserte orders)
saarbarhet.en: Retry or replay of operation gives undesired duplicates (dobbel betaling, dupliserte orders)

eksisterendeKontroll.no: Håp om at retries ikke skjer
eksisterendeKontroll.en: Hope that retries do not happen

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Design alle operasjoner idempotent, idempotency keys, deduplication store (TTL cache), safe to retry
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Design all operations idempotent, idempotency keys, deduplication store (TTL cache), safe to retry

saarbarhet.no: Upstream sender raskere enn downstream kan prosessere, memory exhaustion, cascading failures
saarbarhet.en: Upstream systems send data faster than downstream systems can process it, leading to memory exhaustion and cascading failures

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implement backpressure with reactive streams, bounded queues, load shedding, rate limiting, and 429/503 responses
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement backpressure with reactive streams, bounded queues, load shedding, rate limiting, and 429/503 responses

saarbarhet.no: Når en avhengighet feiler, feiler hele tjenesten i stedet for å degradere funksjonalitet
saarbarhet.en: When a dependency fails, fails hele the service in stedet for to degradere funksjonalitet

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Feature toggles for non-critical features, fallback values, cached responses, static content som fallback
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Feature toggles for non-critical features, fallback values, cached responses, static content that fallback

saarbarhet.no: Én tjeneste feiler, trekker ned alle avhengige tjenester, ingen isolasjon, tight coupling
saarbarhet.en: Én service fails, trekker ned all avhengige services, no isolasjon, tight coupling

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Circuit breakers, bulkheads (isolere ressurser), timeouts, async kommunikasjon, fail-fast på non-critical paths
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Circuit breakers, bulkheads (isolere resources), timeouts, async communications, fail-fast on non-critical paths

saarbarhet.no: Resiliens-mekanismer ikke testet, finner ut ved faktisk nedetid at fallbacks ikke virker
saarbarhet.en: Resilience-mekanismer not tested, finner ut during actual nedetid at fallbacks not virker

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Implementere chaos engineering (Chaos Monkey, fault injection), teste failure scenarios, gamedays, test i prod
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Implement chaos engineering such as fault injection, test failure scenarios, run gamedays, and test in production where appropriate

saarbarhet.no: All integrasjon går via én ESB/middleware, hvis denne feiler stopper all dataflyt
saarbarhet.en: All integrasjon goes via én ESB/middleware, hvis denne fails stopper all dataflyt

foreslaatteTiltak.no: High availability setup, clustering, vurdere å gå bort fra ESB til point-to-point eller service mesh
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Use a highly available setup with clustering, and consider moving away from the ESB toward point-to-point integrations or a service mesh

risikoelement.no: Message transformation i middleware gir leverandør lock-in
risikoelement.en: Message transformation in middleware gives vendor lock-in

saarbarhet.no: Business logic i middleware-config, vanskelig å migrere, proprietær transformasjonslogikk
saarbarhet.en: Business logic is embedded in middleware configuration, is difficult to migrate, and relies on proprietary transformation logic

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Flytte transformasjonslogikk til services, minimal logic i middleware, infrastructure as code for middleware config
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Flytte transformasjonslogikk to services, minimal logic in middleware, infrastructure as code for middleware config

saarbarhet.no: All trafikk går via middleware, begrenset throughput, latency øker, skaleringsutfordringer
saarbarhet.en: All trafikk goes via middleware, begrenset throughput, latency increases, skaleringsutfordringer

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Horizontal scaling av middleware, vurdere direct integration for high-volume, caching, async patterns
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Horizontal scaling of middleware, assess direct integration for high-volume, caching, async patterns

saarbarhet.no: Manuelle endringer i GUI, ikke versjonskontrollert, staging og prod ut-av-sync, ingen audit trail
saarbarhet.en: Manual GUI changes are not version-controlled, staging and production operations apart, and there is no audit trail

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Infrastructure as Code for middleware, versjonskontroll av config, automated utrulling, configuration validation
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Use Infrastructure as Code for middleware, version control configuration, automate deployment, and validate configuration changes

saarbarhet.no: Melding går inn i middleware og forsvinner, vanskelig å trace end-to-end, debugging tar lang tid
saarbarhet.en: Message goes inn in middleware and forsvinner, difficult to trace end-to-end, debugging tar lang time

foreslaatteTiltak.no: Distributed tracing (correlation IDs), end-to-end transaction overvåking, business prosess overvåking, integration flow visualization
foreslaatteTiltak.en: Distributed tracing (correlation IDs), end-to-end transaction monitoring, business process monitoring, integration flow visualization
